innovation_matrix.title: OneDrive Intake Orchestration
innovation_matrix.impact: Transforms source folders into normalized Markdown sidecars and structured manifest rows.
innovation_matrix.signal: Batch intake with root + glob controls

innovation_matrix.title: Email Consolidation & De-duplication
innovation_matrix.impact: Merges overlapping exports, preserves strongest dates, and removes redundant rows.

innovation_matrix.title: Sync Payload Planning
innovation_matrix.impact: Generates deterministic create/update payload plans before live sync execution.

innovation_matrix.title: Manual Override Governance
innovation_matrix.impact: Allows explicit case-link or no-case directives with reason tracking and replay safety.

innovation_matrix.title: Repo Consistency Sweep
innovation_matrix.impact: Flags manifest drift, uncataloged canonical files, and missing sidecar coverage.

innovation_matrix.title: Tactical Brief CLI
innovation_matrix.impact: Builds matter-specific and daily operating briefs from manifest + case indexes.

innovation_matrix.title: Pattern Phenomenology Registry
innovation_matrix.impact: Tracks recurring behavioral patterns for longitudinal retrieval and pattern heat.
innovation_matrix.signal: Pattern hits grouped by strategic band

innovation_matrix.title: Character/Cast Indexing
innovation_matrix.impact: Clusters recurring actors and aliases to preserve context across matters.
innovation_matrix.signal: Role-based cast cards with matter counts

innovation_matrix.title: Runway Deadline Bands
innovation_matrix.impact: Converts raw event dates into urgency bands for immediate triage.

innovation_matrix.title: Static Portal App State
innovation_matrix.impact: Delivers dashboard + tables + preferences using JSON snapshots and local storage only.

innovation_matrix.title: Billing Readiness Snapshots
innovation_matrix.impact: Computes line-item totals from configurable rates for rapid engagement previews.

innovation_matrix.title: Workflow Packet Staging
innovation_matrix.impact: Stages chronology, treatment, and damages notes before downstream packet workflows.
